-- 3 of 52 --

3 key ingredients to successful quiz funnels
1. 	A Core Concept that Resonates – e.g. metabolic type, hormone type, etc.
2. 	A Scalable Funnel Business Model – one the supports acquisition KPIs that
allow scale
3. 	Lots of Hard Work Optimizing – split tests weekly
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
